stratagem.name: CRUSADING CONQUERORS
stratagem.lore: The sheer will of these battle‑brothers to reclaim the sacred Five Hundred Worlds is overwhelming.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagem.name: FURIOUS DEDICATION
stratagem.lore: Cold fury of purpose drives the charge of the Space Marines, their absolute dedication to their cause lending them ferocious speed and strength.
stratagem.when: Your Charge phase or the Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not declared a charge or been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Charge rolls made for your unit and add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.
stratagem.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per turn.

stratagem.name: FIGHT TO THE END
stratagem.lore: Those who have sworn an oath to see Ultramar reclaimed will not yield a single yard of its territories once they have seized and secured them.
stratagem.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagem.name: SCIONS OF GUILLIMAN
stratagem.lore: The gene‑sons of Roboute Guilliman are masters of his tenets, regardless of which Chapter they hail from.
stratagem.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army ends a Fall Back move.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagem.name: ULTRAMARIAN DESTINY
stratagem.lore: All those Space Marines fighting to defend or to expand the Ultramarines stellar realm trust that their conquest – though it must be hard fought for – is nothing short of ordained by the Primarch’s will.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagem.name: MARCHING EVER ON
stratagem.lore: The road to the complete rebuilding of the Five Hundred Worlds will be a long and gruelling one, and those who fight their way along it cannot pause in their advance for even a moment.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6"+1.
